# go-ai-native-mcp (mcp:org.vibevm.ai-native/go-ai-native-mcp)

The AI-Native Go discipline served over MCP: one stdio binary, the
discipline command surface plus the tcg type oracle, launched by an agent
host straight from this package's slot. Serving needs no vibe anywhere on
the machine (PROP-027 §2.6).

> Campaign in flight: built end-to-end per
> `spec/terraforms/GO-AI-NATIVE-PLAN-v0.1.md`; the server brief is
> `spec/tools/discipline-mcp-go.md`. This README is finalized at campaign
> close.
